reviewedArtifacts.rationale: Phase 5 query facade resolves both local and namespaced monster IDs to read-only registry MonsterDef entries.
Phase 5 query facade returns all deduplicated official monster definitions in stable registration order.
Phase 5 compatibility facade reconstructs the legacy MonsterDef shape and resolves ordered drops through each registry monster dropTableId.
TypeBox source of truth for non-empty ordered monster pools and optional positive integer weights.
Projects six zone pools, six boss-floor pools and three skull cavern pools without sorting legacy members.
Reads raw frozen monster pool definitions by local or namespaced ID.
Resolves ordered pool entries to legacy monster shapes and expands weights without consuming randomness.
Supplies registry-backed ordered candidates to all 120 main mine floors and display consumers.
Resolves the six required boss-floor pools and rejects invalid multi-entry boss mappings.
Resolves the three skull cavern pools while thresholds, boss cadence, scaling and random selection remain framework-owned.
TypeBox source of truth for the strict fruit/wild discriminated union; generated tree.schema.json rejects mixed variants and invalid lifecycle values.
Projects the unique leaf definitions into eleven ordered official tree entries without changing local IDs, names, prices, seasons, lifecycle values or products.
Returns frozen registry definitions by local or namespaced ID and preserves official fruit-then-wild registration order.
Builds independent legacy compatibility objects for Store and composable consumers while preserving persisted local tree type IDs.
Supplies ShopView sapling lookup and product lookup for fruit or tap output using local or namespaced item IDs.
TypeBox source of truth for fish definitions; generated fish.schema.json accepts any-weather fish entries and rejects invalid availability, difficulty and tuning fields.
Projects every legacy fish entry into ordered official fish definitions without changing local IDs, names, prices, availability, difficulty or mini-game tuning.
Returns frozen registry fish definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy FishDef objects for compatibility checks.
Supplies local-ID compatibility lookups and season/weather/location availability results equivalent to the legacy getFishById() and getAvailableFish() behavior.
TypeBox source of truth for bamboo forest forage definitions; generated forage.schema.json rejects invalid item references, seasons, chance bounds and experience rewards.
Projects every legacy forage item into ordered official forage definitions without changing local item IDs, names, seasons, chance values or experience rewards.
Returns frozen registry forage definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy ForageItemDef objects for compatibility checks.
Supplies the legacy getForageItems() seasonal filtering behavior through the official forage registry facade.
TypeBox source of truth for animal species definitions; generated animal.schema.json rejects invalid building, cost, produceDays and friendship fields.
Projects every legacy animal species definition into ordered official animal entries without changing local IDs, names, costs, buildings, products or production cycles.
Returns frozen registry animal definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy AnimalDef objects for compatibility checks.
Supplies local-ID compatibility lookups and building-filtered animal definitions to useAnimalStore and AnimalView.
TypeBox source of truth for animal feed definitions; generated animal-feed.schema.json rejects invalid localized text and price fields.
Projects every legacy animal feed definition into ordered official entries without changing local IDs, display names, prices or descriptions.
Returns frozen registry animal feed definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy AnimalFeedDef objects for compatibility checks.
Supplies the legacy getFeedDef() local-ID compatibility lookup to AnimalView.
TypeBox source of truth for animal building and upgrade definitions; generated animal-building.schema.json rejects invalid building types, numeric bounds and material shapes.
Projects legacy coop, barn, stable and nested upgrades into ordered official entries without changing local building IDs, costs, capacities or material requirements.
Returns frozen registry animal building definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy AnimalBuildingDef objects for compatibility checks.
Supplies local-ID compatibility lookups for construction and upgrade flows in useAnimalStore and AnimalView.
TypeBox source of truth for animal incubation mappings; generated animal-incubation.schema.json rejects invalid item IDs, animal IDs, building types and day bounds.
Projects legacy egg-to-animal incubation mappings into ordered official entries without changing egg item IDs, hatched animal types, target buildings or incubation days.
Returns frozen registry animal incubation definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy incubation definition objects for compatibility checks.
Supplies local egg item ID compatibility lookups and map shape for coop and barn incubation UI and Store flows.
TypeBox source of truth for tool upgrade cost definitions; generated tool-upgrade.schema.json rejects invalid tool types, tiers, money and material shapes.
Projects every legacy tool upgrade cost into ordered official entries without changing tool type fields, tier transitions, money costs or material requirements.
Returns frozen registry tool upgrade definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy ToolUpgradeCost objects for getUpgradeCost().
Checks every tool upgrade material item reference against taoyuan:item and reports REG-REFERENCE-001 before the registry snapshot is accepted.
TypeBox source of truth for ring equipment definitions in the first taoyuan:equipment slice; generated equipment.schema.json rejects invalid kind, effects, recipe materials and numeric bounds.
Projects every legacy ring definition into ordered official equipment entries without changing local IDs, effects, recipes, obtain-source text or sell prices.
Returns frozen registry equipment definitions and reconstructs legacy RingDef objects for getRingById() compatibility.
Checks equipment item IDs and ring recipe material references against taoyuan:item before registry snapshots are accepted.
TypeBox source of truth for equipment set definitions, including piece references, bonus thresholds and supported equipment effects.
Projects every legacy equipment set into ordered official entries without changing set IDs, names, piece references, bonus descriptions or effects.
Returns frozen registry equipment set definitions and reconstructs legacy EquipmentSetDef objects for inventory set bonuses and old piece lookup.
Checks every equipment set piece reference against taoyuan:item and reports REG-REFERENCE-001 before registry snapshots are accepted.
TypeBox source of truth for fish pond species definitions; generated pondable-fish.schema.json rejects invalid item references, maturity days, production rates and genetics bounds.
Projects every legacy pondable fish definition into ordered official entries without changing local IDs, display names, maturity days, production rates, products or default genetics.
Returns frozen registry pondable fish definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy PondableFishDef objects for compatibility checks.
Supplies the legacy getPondableFish() local-ID compatibility lookup to useFishPondStore and FishPondView.
TypeBox source of truth for fish pond breed definitions; generated pond-breed.schema.json rejects invalid generation values and parent reference shapes.
Projects all 400 generated legacy pond breeds into ordered official entries without changing IDs, names, generations, base fish links or parent pairs.
Returns frozen registry pond breed definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy PondBreedDef objects for compatibility checks.
Supplies local-ID compatibility lookups, generation/species filters, Gen1 admission candidates and order-insensitive parent-pair lookup to useFishPondStore.
TypeBox source of truth for fish pond build cost, upgrade cost, level capacity and unlimited-at-level definitions.
Projects the legacy fish pond facility definition into an official registry entry without changing money costs, material costs, level capacities or unlimited level semantics.
Returns frozen registry fish pond facility definitions by local or namespaced ID and reconstructs legacy compatibility objects for equivalence checks.
Supplies the local-ID compatibility lookup used by fish pond construction, upgrade and capacity facades.
TypeBox source of truth for farmhouse, cave and cellar upgrade definitions, including materials, cave pools and cellar capacity fields.
Projects legacy farmhouse, cave and cellar upgrade definitions into official registry entries without changing order, IDs, costs, materials, pools or runtime values.
Returns frozen registry building upgrade definitions and reconstructs legacy farmhouse, cave and cellar compatibility objects for HomeStore and UI consumers.
Checks building upgrade material references plus cave mushroom and fruit pool item references before registry snapshots are accepted.
TypeBox source of truth for wallet item definitions, including display text, passive effect descriptor and unlock condition text.
Projects legacy wallet item definitions into official registry entries without changing IDs, names, descriptions, effects or unlock condition text.
Returns frozen registry wallet item definitions and reconstructs legacy WalletItemDef compatibility objects for Store and UI consumers.
TypeBox source of truth for opening farm map definitions, including map type, display name, description and bonus text.
Projects legacy farm map definitions into official registry entries without changing type IDs, names, descriptions, bonus text or order.
Returns frozen registry farm map definitions and reconstructs legacy FarmMapDef compatibility objects for the MainMenu new-game flow.
